{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Slumbering Wraith’s arm
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] attached the [[Slumbering Wraith’s arm]] to his elbow.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] must handle the full force of the [[Slumbering Wraith’s arm]] when a seal wears off.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
